form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run came from midfield; 2nd of 11 at this track Mdn on March 13 over 1400m, long-neck behind Flaming Dragon carrying 58kg at $3.60. The run before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 8 at this track Mdn on February 28 over 1623m, 3 len behind Extra Zero with 58kg at $4.20. Racing in good order and has to be included on recent efforts.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months eased back early on 5th of 9 at this track Mdn on March 13 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Rubick Delight carrying 58kg at $4.80. Previously second-up 7th of 11 at Bunbury Mdn on November 23 over 1685m, 7 len behind Invincible Thief with 58kg at $13. Can sit closer this time and turn in a much better effort.
